title: Hint
text: Consider how we can use Bayes Rule to evaluate this probability.

title: Hint
text: We can set up the probability as P[Fish from labor bay] * P[Salman | Fish from labor bay] + P[Fish from Obi Wan Keno bay] * P[Salman | Fish from Obi Wan Keno bay] + P[Fish from Spelling bay] * P[Salman | Fish from Spelling bay]
